pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing task.json description and verifier.py logic which requires navigating video, capturing snapshot images, identifying exact event timestamps, exporting short clips, and writing a documented timeline JSON.

Verified by matching task instructions and setup scripts which involve a dashcam video, building a forensic timeline, and exporting evidence clips. The difficulty is defined as very_hard in task.json.

O*NET OnLine and BLS SOC databases confirm that SOC 13-1031 exactly maps to Claims Adjusters, Examiners, and Investigators. The task description assigns the agent the role of 'insurance claims investigator'.
Verified by the task description ('insurance claims investigator') and the synthetic case ID 'INS-2026-03847' generated in the incident log.

privileged_info_summary: The task employs a synthetically generated 3-minute dashcam video created via FFmpeg. It tasks the agent with investigating an insurance claim (Case #: INS-2026-03847) acting as a Claims Adjuster (SOC 13-1031). The correct ground truth event timestamps are 15s (IMPACT), 42s (SWERVE), 78s (DEBRIS), 121s (STOP), and 156s (REVERSE), which the agent must discover by examining the video to correct the falsely reported timestamps in the preliminary incident log.
